top_signals.title: SpaceX stock falls 6%, pacing for third-straight day of losses after red-hot IPO start
top_signals.summary: A rally following the company's record breaking IPO on June 12 has cooled, with stock dropping the past two full days of trading.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Qatar Expects No Impact on LNG Exports From Domestic Gas Blast
top_signals.summary: Qatar said liquefied natural gas export capacity won’t be impacted by an accident on Sunday that caused explosion at the Ras Laffan industrial complex.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: OKX and NYSE partner to bridge tradfi and crypto markets in joint venture led by Andrew Cuomo
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
